answers.answer: Under Article 28(1) of the General Partnership Law 2004, each Partner is jointly and severally liable with the other Partners for all debts and obligations of the General Partnership incurred while he is a Partner, unless otherwise agreed.
The maximum fine for failing to provide a copy of an assignment of rights to the Registered Agent or Registrar within 30 days is $1,500, as specified in Schedule 3 of the Foundations Law.
